Girls PG near Osmanpura

Walking distance from Deogiri College, DIEMS & Osmanpura's top coaching centres

Jyoti Girls PG is ideally located in Jyoti Nagar, Osmanpura — 0.8 km from Deogiri College and 0.9 km from DIEMS engineering college. Students from both institutions walk to the PG daily without needing an auto or rickshaw. The PG is also within easy reach of Osmanpura's major coaching institutes — Sakaar PCMB Classes, 3S JEE Institute, Pratishthan Classes, Rajat's Physics, and the Unacademy Centre.

Stay within walking distance of Deogiri College, DIEMS, and Osmanpura's premier institutes for NEET, JEE, and professional courses without compromising on safety.

Minutes Away from Colleges & Academies

Deogiri College & DIEMS

0.8 km walk to Deogiri College and 0.9 km to DIEMS engineering — no daily auto or rickshaw expense.

Aakash & Resonance

Just a 7-minute walk from Jyoti Girls PG, making early morning batches easy for NEET aspirants.

Allen Career Institute

Reachable in under 10 minutes with safe, well-lit streets and caretaker-approved paths.

CA & CS Tutorials

Popular commerce coaching centres lie within 2 km, with study partners often sharing the same route.

Transport & Support Services

  • 10-minute walk to Deogiri College — no daily auto expense, saving ₹1,500–2,000 per month.
  • Walking distance to Sakaar PCMB, 3S JEE, and Pratishthan coaching centres.
  • Parent alerts for safe arrivals after coaching.
  • Well-lit Jyoti Nagar road — safe for evening walks after coaching classes.

Study Benefits of Staying Close

More Revision Time

Students save 60–90 minutes daily and reinvest the time in revision or mentor sessions.

Less Travel Stress

Walking distance avoids crowded buses, reducing fatigue and improving attendance.

Greater Accountability

Caregivers confirm class timings and match them with curfew logs, keeping focus on academics.

Discuss commute plans
